title: Ability to use previous answers in the text of the next question in Workforms

posts.author: shirozayas (Shiro Zayas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It be nice to have the ability to use an answer from a previous form question dynamically within the title of a subsequent question. For example, if a respondent enters “Acme Corp” for their Company Name, the next question should be able to automatically display as “How many employees work at Acme Corp?” instead of a generic title. This “piping” logic is a standard feature in tools like Qualtrics and Typeform, and adding it to monday.com would significantly improve the user experience and professional feel of our surveys.

What are you trying to achieve

I want to create more professional, conversational, and personalized forms. By using previous answers to provide context for future questions, I can reduce respondent confusion, improve data accuracy, and bring monday.com’s form capabilities in line with dedicated survey tools like Qualtrics or Typeform.
